description: Lac operon from EcoCyc: operon structure, lac promoter/operator, regulators (LacI, CRP-cAMP), structural genes (lacZ, lacY, lacA), and reactions (transport, allolactose, hydrolysis).
name: Lac Operon (EcoCyc-sourced)
notes: V4 = EcoCyc only. LACOPERON, lac promoter (lacP/lacO), lacI, lacZ/Y/A, allolactose and lactose reactions from EcoCyc.
mermaid:
graph TD
    LACTOSE[Lactose]
    LACI[lacI Repressor]
    CAMP[CAP-cAMP]
    PROM[lac promoter]
    OPERON[LACOPERON]
    LACZ[lacZ β-galactosidase]
    LACY[lacY Permease]
    LACA[lacA Transacetylase]
    ALLO[Allolactose]
    GLU[Glucose + Galactose]
    LACTOSE -->|LacY transport| LACY
    LACY -->|intracellular| LACTOSE
    LACTOSE -->|LacZ isomerase| ALLO
    ALLO -->|binds LacI| LACI
    LACI -->|represses| PROM
    CAMP -->|activates| PROM
    PROM --> OPERON
    OPERON --> LACZ
    OPERON --> LACY
    OPERON --> LACA
    LACZ -->|hydrolysis| GLU
    style LACTOSE fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style LACI fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style CAMP fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style PROM fill:#51cf66,color:#000
    style OPERON fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style LACZ fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style LACY fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style LACA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style ALLO fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style GLU fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
scientificAccuracy: EcoCyc operon and pathway annotations; lac promoter and lactose/allolactose reactions.

sources.title: EcoCyc
sources.note: E. coli LACOPERON, lac promoter, lac genes, lactose reactions.
